summary: Persistent graph-based memory for AI agents — MCP-native, markdown-first, ~50MB RAM

title: brightboateng/.Industrial-LLM-Agents
summary: 🚀 Enhance industrial operations with safe, observable LLM agents for sectors like aerospace and manufacturing—complete with prompt safety and evaluation tools.

title: hblabs-co/falcon
summary: Falcon is a real-time freelance job matching platform. It scrapes multiple portals, matches new projects against candidate CVs using vector search and LLM scoring, and delivers instant notifications via push notification and other channels.

title: geeks-accelerator/ollama-herd
summary: Local AI load balancer for Ollama fleets — auto-discovery, smart routing, OpenAI-compatible API, zero config. Perfect for Mac Minis & Studios.

title: apocas/restai
summary: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...

title: DozaVisuals/doza-assist
summary: AI editor's assistant that learns your style from your own cuts. Turn interview footage into rough cuts for Final Cut, Premiere, and Resolve. Mac-native. Local-first.

title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
summary: The all-in-one AI productivity accelerator. On device and privacy first with no annoying setup or configuration.

title: ebongard/renfield
summary: Self-hosted AI assistant with voice satellites, 100+ tool integrations, RAG knowledge base, and full offline capability. Built with FastAPI + React + Ollama.

title: kubawer21/StealthIt
summary: 🛠️ Enhance productivity with StealthIt, a hidden AI utility for screen analysis and voice interaction, ensuring efficiency without detection.

title: barelvi67/gannicus
summary: 🏛️ Generate realistic synthetic data for TypeScript with Gannicus, a powerful library that leverages AI for efficient and coherent data creation.

title: Ontheia/ontheia
summary: Self-hosted AI agent platform — multi-provider, MCP-native, GDPR by Design.
